$comment: spec: draft well-formed .spec file(s) from a free-text description - the front-end to compose. Catalog-driven retrieval: read the KB catalog -> the model PLANS which KB(s) to consult -> the route_score ORACLE gates that selection -> draft the spec(s) grounded on the SELECTED KBs via dynamic search (replacing the old fixed 6-search block) -> the write_specs oracle validates well-formedness and writes atomically, repairing once. Run: `ratchet flow . spec --ws <proj> "<description>"` then review the specs and `compose`.
summary: Draft well-formed Go build spec(s) from a description, grounded on catalog-selected, oracle-verified KBs - the front-end to compose.
